description: linode_account_payment_method_list envelope: count and the full proto AccountPaymentMethod elements. data is a google.protobuf.Struct that round-trips the per-type card object the API returns (credit_card returns card_type/last_four/expiry); the list never returns a full card number, only the masked last_four. The tool paginates and has no filter param, so filter is omitted.
